title: CNC Machinist
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Barona Teollisuus Oy is seeking a CNC machinist in Vantaa. We are seeking a skilled CNC machinist with experience in turning and milling to join our Vantaa-base
description: We are seeking a skilled CNC machinist with experience in turning and milling to join our Vantaa-based engineering company, Barona Teollisuus Oy. This permanent position offers competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements and the opportunity for development within a stable work environment. The role involves working with modern machinery, including a DMG Mori NLX 2500 multitasking lathe (M730UM control) and Heidenhain-controlled machining centers (TNC 530 / 620 / 640). Responsibilities include programming, machine setup, tool selection and optimization, measurements, quality assurance, and part production. The company values expertise, initiative, and a desire to continuously improve operations.
what_we_expect: Experience in CNC turning and/or milling and strong machining expertise
Familiarity with Fanuc, Heidenhain, or Mori controls
job_responsibilities: CNC turning and/or milling, machine setup, programming, and part production.
M730UM control DMG Mori NLX 2500 multitasking lathe (independent programming and machining operations).
We are seeking a skilled CNC machinist to strengthen the production team in versatile turning and milling tasks.
what_we_offer: Support from a skilled and encouraging team
Opportunity for professional competence development through demanding machining tasks
Valuing expertise, initiative, and desire to continuously improve operations

title: CNC Machinist
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Join Barona Teollisuus Oy as a CNC machinist for permanent employment opportunities, including competitive wages, 2-shift schedule, and influence job responsibi
description: We are looking for a skilled CNC machinist with experience in turning and milling to join our production team at Barona Teollisuus Oy in Vantaa. This permanent employment opportunity offers competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements, 2-shift work schedule, and the chance to influence job responsibilities. With modern machinery and strong machining expertise, you'll be responsible for programming and running parts using Fanuc or Heidenhain controls. Experience with Fusion 360 is an advantage, as well as a willingness to work in shifts. The stable and developing work environment at Barona Teollisuus Oy provides support from a competent team and the opportunity to develop skills in demanding machining tasks.
what_we_expect: Experience in CNC turning and/or milling and strong machining skills.
Master Fanuc, Heidenhain or Mori controls and capable of independent programming and setting.
Willingness to work in shifts is considered an advantage.
job_responsibilities: The work includes CNC turning and/or milling, machine settings, programming and running parts. On the turning side, you work on a modern DMG Mori NLX 2500 multifunction lathe (M730UM control) and are independently responsible for programming and machining.

On the milling side, the work includes 4-axis machining with Heidenhain controlled machining centers (TNC 530 / 620 / 640). Tasks also include tool selection and optimization, measurements and quality assurance. The manufactured pieces vary from single pieces and small series to prototypes.
We are looking for a skilled CNC machinist to strengthen the production team for versatile turning and milling tasks.
what_we_offer: A stable and developing work environment in a reputable engineering company
The opportunity to influence your own job description
Support from a competent and supportive team
Opportunity to develop skills in demanding and varied machining work
search_keywords: CNC machinist, CNC turning, CNC milling, modern machinery, skilled machinist, production team, versatile tasks, DMG Mori NLX 2500 multifunction lathe, Heidenhain controlled machining centers, small and individual pieces, production development

title: Summer cook
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements and other company and links
meta_description: Neste Tuulos is seeking a Summer Cook at their Hämeenlinna office as a chef's helper. This role involves preparing food and dishes while adhering to health
description: Neste Tuulos, located in Hämeenlinna, Finland, is seeking a Summer Cook to join their team as a chef's helper. This role involves pre-preparing food, preparing la carte dishes, baking, setting up the buffet table, washing dishes and cleaning, all while adhering to food-related health, safety, hygiene, and other relevant legislation. The summer cook must be proficient in using cooking techniques, methods, and kitchen appliances, as well as storing food ingredients correctly. This is a fixed-term summer job from May 1st to September 30th, with the possibility of an extension upon negotiation. Working hours are between 7:00 AM and 4:30 PM, including weekends. The position requires a car for commuting due to the workplace's location along Highway 12 in Tuulos.
what_we_expect: Knows his job, is independent and professionally proud
Works in good cooperation with his partner in the kitchen
Neste Tuulos' service selection includes breakfast buffet, home-cooked lunch, evening buffet and a la carte dishes.

description: We are looking for a Regular Assembler in Härmä! This full-time permanent position requires high-quality assembly work with precision and commitment to quality standards. Duties include assembling large components, using cranes for moving and handling products, adhering to strict quality and safety standards, reading drawings, and working according to instructions. The ideal candidate will have a good ability to read drawings and visualize concepts, as well as a willingness to work in demanding production environments. We offer very high-quality training, a focus on investment in quality and competence, two shift options starting at €15/h with potential for up to €18/h based on skills accumulation. The role is ideal for someone who enjoys physical work and handling large pieces.

description: We are looking for an experienced building and civil engineering surveyor in the Lahti, Uusimaa, Espoo, and Helsinki areas. The ideal candidate should have at least three years of experience in measurement tasks, be proficient with Trimble equipment, possess 3D-Win and AutoCAD skills, and demonstrate an independent and responsible work approach. Our team is committed to providing a stable job environment, fair compensation, professional development opportunities, comprehensive occupational health care benefits, exercise, cultural events, massage services, and competitive salaries based on experience plus bonuses. Interested candidates are encouraged to contact Jussi Heikkilä at 044 378 6495 or visit geops.fi for more information by calling or submitting an application via email.
